message:
feat(core): homomorphic stream hashing for output integrity verification (wa-c478)

Dual polynomial rolling hash (128-bit) with O(1) space per-byte updates.
Homomorphic combine enables H(A‖B) = f(H(A), H(B)) without buffering —
producer/consumer can independently verify stream integrity. 24 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
